'''''Droids'' 8''' is the eighth and final issue of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] series of comics. Published under the [[Marvel Comics]], [[Star Comics]] imprint, this issue had a cover price of $1.00 U.S. and $1.25 Canadian. It was published [[March 17]], [[1987]]<ref name="Marvel Age" /> with a cover date of [[June]] 1987.

==Plot summary==
After making it back to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], following the death of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] are brought to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], where Artoo delivers the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]] to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Upon their arrival, the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] discover and destroy a homing droid tracking their whereabouts. Following this, Artoo joins [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on the Rebel assault on the Death Star.

{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
This series was based on the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] animated TV series, but the stories are original and not adaptations of the show. This particular story arc, however, was a semi-adaptation of the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], with additional backstory added through the eyes of C-3PO and R2-D2.
